languages.original_text: "Fact one. My interest in xenos is easily mistaken for a proclivity. It is not. I find them no more appealing than I would a cadaver being vivisected to ascertain what sickness ended its existence. They are objects that I study in order to answer a simple question: how can they be destroyed most effectively?"

languages.text: "Факт первый. Мой интерес к ксеносам легко принять за симпатию. Это не так. Они мне симпатичны не больше, чем кадавр, что подвергается вивисекции, дабы узнать какая хворь оборвала его существование. Они — объекты, чье изучение дает ответ на простой вопрос: как их можно уничтожить наиболее эффективно?"

"Fact one. My interest in xenos is easily mistaken for a proclivity. It is not. I find them no more appealing than I would a cadaver being vivisected to ascertain what sickness ended its existence. They are objects that I study in order to answer a simple question: how can they be destroyed most effectively?"

languages.text: «Primer dato. Es fácil interpretar mi interés por los xenos como predilección. No lo es. No les tengo mayor apego que a un cadáver diseccionado para descubrir qué enfermedad acabó con su existencia. Son objetos que estudio para responder a una sencilla pregunta: ¿cómo podemos destruirlos con mayor eficacia?».
languages.original_text: "Fact one. My interest in xenos is easily mistaken for a proclivity. It is not. I find them no more appealing than I would a cadaver being vivisected to ascertain what sickness ended its existence. They are objects that I study in order to answer a simple question: how can they be destroyed most effectively?"

traits.locale_text: «Primer dato. Es fácil interpretar mi interés por los xenos como predilección. No lo es. No les tengo mayor apego que a un cadáver diseccionado para descubrir qué enfermedad acabó con su existencia. Son objetos que estudio para responder a una sencilla pregunta: ¿cómo podemos destruirlos con mayor eficacia?».

languages.text: “事实一。我对异形的兴趣很容易被误解为一种偏好。其实并没有。我对它们的兴趣，就跟解剖一具尸体、研究其死因差不多。它们是我的研究对象，我只是想通过他们解答一个简单的问题：如何才能最有效地消灭它们？”
languages.original_text: "Fact one. My interest in xenos is easily mistaken for a proclivity. It is not. I find them no more appealing than I would a cadaver being vivisected to ascertain what sickness ended its existence. They are objects that I study in order to answer a simple question: how can they be destroyed most effectively?"

traits.locale_text: “事实一。我对异形的兴趣很容易被误解为一种偏好。其实并没有。我对它们的兴趣，就跟解剖一具尸体、研究其死因差不多。它们是我的研究对象，我只是想通过他们解答一个简单的问题：如何才能最有效地消灭它们？”

languages.text: « Fait numéro un. On pourrait facilement prendre l'intérêt que je porte aux xénos pour de l'appréciation. Croyez-moi, ce n'est pas le cas. Je ne les trouve pas plus attrayants qu'un corps qu'on dissèque afin de découvrir quelle maladie a mis un terme à son existence. Ce sont des objets que j'étudie dans le but de répondre à une simple question : quelle sera la façon la plus efficace de les détruire ? »
languages.original_text: "Fact one. My interest in xenos is easily mistaken for a proclivity. It is not. I find them no more appealing than I would a cadaver being vivisected to ascertain what sickness ended its existence. They are objects that I study in order to answer a simple question: how can they be destroyed most effectively?"

traits.locale_text: « Fait numéro un. On pourrait facilement prendre l'intérêt que je porte aux xénos pour de l'appréciation. Croyez-moi, ce n'est pas le cas. Je ne les trouve pas plus attrayants qu'un corps qu'on dissèque afin de découvrir quelle maladie a mis un terme à son existence. Ce sont des objets que j'étudie dans le but de répondre à une simple question : quelle sera la façon la plus efficace de les détruire ? »

languages.text: "Erstens. Mein Interesse für Xenos wird oft als Schwäche missverstanden. Das ist es aber nicht. Ich finde sie nicht ansprechender als einen Kadaver, den ich seziere, um herauszufinden, an welcher Krankheit er verendet ist. Sie sind Objekte, die ich studiere, um eine einfache Frage zu beantworten: Wie kann man sie möglichst effizient zerstören?"
languages.original_text: "Fact one. My interest in xenos is easily mistaken for a proclivity. It is not. I find them no more appealing than I would a cadaver being vivisected to ascertain what sickness ended its existence. They are objects that I study in order to answer a simple question: how can they be destroyed most effectively?"

traits.locale_text: "Erstens. Mein Interesse für Xenos wird oft als Schwäche missverstanden. Das ist es aber nicht. Ich finde sie nicht ansprechender als einen Kadaver, den ich seziere, um herauszufinden, an welcher Krankheit er verendet ist. Sie sind Objekte, die ich studiere, um eine einfache Frage zu beantworten: Wie kann man sie möglichst effizient zerstören?"

languages.text: 「事実その1。私の異星人に対する興味は、性癖と誤解されやすい。そんなことはない。何の病気でその存在が終わったのかを確かめるために生体解剖される死体と同じように、私は彼らに魅力を感じない。どうすれば最も効果的に破壊できるかという単純な問いに答えるために研究する対象なのです」。
languages.original_text: "Fact one. My interest in xenos is easily mistaken for a proclivity. It is not. I find them no more appealing than I would a cadaver being vivisected to ascertain what sickness ended its existence. They are objects that I study in order to answer a simple question: how can they be destroyed most effectively?"

languages.text: "Birinci gerçek. Zenolara olan ilgim, kolaylıkla bir eğilimle karıştırılabilir. Öyle değil. Gözümde, varlığını hangi hastalığın sonlandırdığını anlamak için dirikesim yapılan bir kadavradan farksızlar. Basit bir soruyu cevaplamak için incelediğim nesnelerden ibaretler. Bu soru da şu: En etkili şekilde nasıl yok edilebilirler?"
languages.original_text: "Fact one. My interest in xenos is easily mistaken for a proclivity. It is not. I find them no more appealing than I would a cadaver being vivisected to ascertain what sickness ended its existence. They are objects that I study in order to answer a simple question: how can they be destroyed most effectively?"

Bu soru da şu: En etkili şekilde nasıl yok edilebilirler?"
